name: Another Round Golf Club
address: 151 Rt. 10 North Grantham Greenway, Unit # 3, Building #2, Grantham, NH 03753
about: Another Round Golf Club (ARGC) is a membership-based indoor golf facility featuring top-of-the-line Trackman iO simulators. The venue offers access to over 400 of the world's best courses projected in 4K ultra HD, providing an immersive golfing experience in a comfortable environment. ARGC operates on a reservation-based system, open 24/7 to members, with a 'pay as you play' fee structure that includes no additional guest fees. The club is designed for both serious game improvement and social play, offering amenities such as leagues, tournaments, and lessons from PGA professionals.
why_golfers_like_it: High-quality Trackman iO simulators with 4K course visuals
Comprehensive lesson programs with PGA professionals
Flexible pricing with 'pay as you play' structure

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB policy not specified
